overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dense futuristic Asian-inspired cyberpunk city. The journey progresses from narrow alleys with food stalls up concrete stairs, past a police car under an overpass, and through commercial streets lined with holographic advertisements and digital glitch-effect storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a cluttered alleyway, passing food stalls and trash piles while approaching a staircase

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a concrete bench engaged in conversation

entered.detail: mobile food vendor cart with green base and overhead canopy
scattered garbage bags and debris piled against the wall
floating holographic advertisements with pink and blue neon colors
low concrete seating where two pedestrians are resting
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow cyberpunk alleyway lined with trash bags and street food carts. Two NPCs sit on a concrete bench to the left while holographic neon signs float overhead. The environment is cluttered with urban debris and shaded by surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell leading to elevated underpass

events.description: begins ascending long concrete staircase with red railings
reaches top of stairs and enters steam-filled underpass area

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs while holding the railing, transitioning from ground level to an elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking near the parked police vehicle under the overpass

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with weathered steps leading upward
painted metal handrail running along the left side of the stairs
vertical pipe releasing white steam into the underpass
white and black police vehicle with glowing blue POLICE text on side
cyan arrow-shaped sign with Japanese text pointing left

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a long concrete staircase with red railings, transitioning from the alley to an elevated underpass. Steam vents release white clouds near a parked futuristic police car. A neon directional sign hangs overhead as the environment becomes darker and more enclosed.

events.description: passing parked police car on the right side of the walkway
exiting shaded underpass into sunlit open street with crosswalks

agents.ego_description: walking past the police vehicle and crossing the street into a sunlit commercial district

notable_agents.action: futuristic police car parked under the overpass with emergency lights off

entered.detail: vertical traffic light showing red signal
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
multi-story mixed-use structures with balconies and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The player exits the underpass by walking past a parked police car and crossing a zebra-striped crosswalk. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright sunlight. Commercial buildings line both sides of the street as the camera moves into a more open urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial shopping street with neon signage

events.description: crossing another intersection with zebra crossing markings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: shop fronts with glowing neon signs and Japanese characters
large floating digital billboards displaying animated advertisements
bright green automated vending unit with digital interface

segments.scene_description: The player continues through a sunlit commercial district lined with neon storefronts and holographic advertising screens. The street features multiple crosswalks and a green vending machine stands out on the left sidewalk. The architecture mixes traditional and futuristic cyberpunk elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital glitch storefronts

events.description: entering covered walkway with glitch-effect digital storefront displays

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through a covered corridor while observing the glitching digital shop displays on the left

entered.detail: shop window with colorful abstract glitch patterns and percentage discount stickers
roofed corridor with structural beams overhead blocking the sky
cyan neon strips running along the edges of the shop windows

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian walkway where the storefronts display vibrant glitch-art effects with colorful abstract patterns. Cyan neon trim lights line the shop windows while the overhead structure blocks natural light, creating an artificial neon-lit atmosphere distinct from the previous sunlit streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cluttered, shaded alleyway into a bright commercial district before ending in a neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins by weaving through a narrow alley lined with street food carts and floating holographic signs, moving past urban debris and seated NPCs. As the camera ascends a concrete staircase with red railings, the environment becomes more enclosed and dark, passing through clouds of steam near a parked futuristic police car under an overpass. The scene then opens dramatically as the camera crosses a zebra-striped crosswalk, shifting from deep shadow into the bright sunlight of a commercial street filled with holographic advertisements and green vending machines. Finally, the movement leads into a covered walkway where natural light is replaced by an artificial glow, transitioning into a space defined by cyan neon trim and vibrant glitch-art storefronts.
